content.query:
SELECT      MM.ITNO, MM.ITDS, BAL.WHLO, SUM(STQT) AS OnHandApproved, SUM(QUQT) as OnHandInspect, SUM(RJQT) as OnHandReject
,           APPR--, (SUM(STQT)+SUM(QUQT)+SUM(RJQT))*APPR as InventoryValue
FROM        M3.MITBAL BAL
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON BAL.ITNO = BAL.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.MITFAC MF ON MM.ITNO = MF.ITNO AND MF.FACI = 'TLC'
GROUP BY    MM.ITNO, MM.ITDS, BAL.WHLO, APPR
HAVING      SUM(STQT) + SUM(QUQT) + SUM(RJQT) > 0



select itno, count(*) from m3.mitfac where FACI = 'TLC' group by itno having count(*) > 1
select * from m3.mitfac where itno = 'Z-131060-BLACK'
